description_long: This is a compact, single-engine airplane with a striking red fuselage and wings, featuring a classic, streamlined design reminiscent of early 20th-century racing aircraft. The nose houses a prominent radial engine with a black propeller and a metallic cowling, while the cockpit is open and situated just behind the engine, with a small windshield and visible seating for one. The wings are low-mounted and straight, extending horizontally from the fuselage with rounded tips and no visible winglets. The landing gear is fixed and consists of two main wheels under the wings and a small tailwheel at the rear. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, all painted red and smoothly integrated into the fuselage. The surface of the airplane shows some wear and subtle weathering, giving it a slightly used, realistic appearance.
description: A compact, red, single-engine airplane with a low-wing, open cockpit, and fixed landing gear, featuring a classic streamlined design and visible weathering.
description_view_0: Front view showing the radial engine, black propeller, and symmetrical low-mounted wings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the open cockpit, fixed landing gear, and streamlined fuselage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail section with single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the cockpit opening, landing gear, and the full length of the fuselage.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight configuration with rounded tips and no winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a visible propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a single tailwheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open single-seat cockpit with a small windshield.
